summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-51 is addressed in ReportForm.tsx (assistTech property unchanged, label updated to 'Assis Technician'). REQ-52 is addressed in pdfGenerator.ts (label changed to 'Assis Technician:', assistTech property name preserved). REQ-53 is addressed in pdfGenerator.ts with enhanced layout: bold uppercase section headings, divider lines, card-background content blocks, structured label/value spacing, taller header with large bold 'SECURITY ENGINEERING INC.' and subtitle 'DAILY FIELD REPORT', and left-accent-bar styling — all without changing color values. The file-summaries.txt confirms these changes explicitly.
